data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Insurance requirement verification', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the enforcement or checking of insurance certificates prior to booking. The use case summary states that an insurance certificate is required two weeks before the event, yet no specific evidence or API reads were presented to demonstrate that this requirement was actively verified or enforced. This indicates a clear gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement of insurance requirement verification.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
